candidates.why: Best top-line total revenue label; matches reported sales values across years and is more clearly a total revenue line than the header.
Direct revenue line and same values as the main revenue total in most years; good fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.row_label: Gross Revenue from Business Activities - Total
candidates.why: Gross revenue includes taxes and is therefore less appropriate than net/top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across years; not to be summed.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line; clearly represents COGS.
Direct production input cost, but appears to be a component of cost of revenue rather than the full COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility - Unclassified
candidates.why: More granular component of materials cost, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct total cost-of-revenue line over underlying material components to avoid partial coverage.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D, which is ideal under the SG&A hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an SG&A component, but should not be used when a populated explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS and likely D&A; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit populated SG&A line per hierarchy rule. Did not add R&D because this row explicitly excludes R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line exists, but the selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, so per rule XRD should be left empty rather than separately mapped here.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Also a dedicated R&D line, but same issue as above and appears supplemental.

variables.notes: Left empty because the selected SG&A row is explicitly 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'; per instructions, when SG&A clearly does not include R&D, XRD should be empty to avoid creating an unnecessary subtraction term.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense line; more precise than broader finance cost totals and preferable to net finance costs.
Also a valid interest expense line with identical values, good fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Lease-interest component, but likely already included in total interest expense; adding it would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of semantically equivalent total interest expense labels across years; do not sum them. Excluded lease-interest supplemental row to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner-attributable equity line and properly excludes minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line; good fallback if label changes.
Also appears to equal parent common equity and excludes minority interest here; useful fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent/owner-attributable equity lines to exclude minority interest and prevent double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest equity line.
Equivalent minority-interest label and good fallback across years.

variables.notes: Priority list for minority interest / non-controlling interest labels; not to be summed.
